text: “School crossing zone” means those sections of streets not adjacent to school property that pupils cross while following a designated walking route to school.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484B
##### § 484B.060 — “School crossing zone” defined.

“School crossing zone” means those sections of streets not adjacent to school property that pupils cross while following a designated walking route to school.

subsections.text: “School crossing zone” means those sections of streets not adjacent to school property that pupils cross while following a designated walking route to school.
